display.purpose: Large dashboard or welcome headings (rarely used).

headline.purpose: Page titles in TopBar and major section headers.

title.purpose: PageHeader titles and small section leads.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, card copy, descriptions. Capped at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase table headers, filter labels, captions.

motion.name: ease-strong
motion.purpose: Primary strong ease-out for hovers and reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button with near-black fill and white text.
components.css: .eh-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: var(--font-figtree); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.985 0 0); background: oklch(0.205 0 0); border: none; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); outline: none; } .eh-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.205 0 0 / 0.9); } .eh-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action button with border and optional icon.
components.css: .eh-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: var(--font-figtree); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5eaf0; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms; outline: none; } .eh-btn-outline:hover { background: #f1f5f9; border-color: #cbd5e1; } .eh-btn-outline:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79,70,229,0.2); }

components.name: SurfaceCard
components.description: Default content container with a subtle lift.
components.css: .eh-surface-card { padding: 24px; font-family: var(--font-figtree); color: #0f172a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5eaf0; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,0.04), 0 8px 24px -8px rgba(15,23,42,0.08); transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), box-shadow 200ms; } .eh-surface-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(15,23,42,0.08), 0 16px 32px -12px rgba(15,23,42,0.12); }

components.name: NavItem
components.description: Main navigation item for the persistent sidebar.
components.css: .eh-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: 44px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: var(--font-figtree); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #475569; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 14px; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; outline: none; } .eh-nav-item:hover { background: #f1f5f9; color: #0f172a; } .eh-nav-item--active { background: #4f46e5; color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(79,70,229,0.24); } .eh-nav-item:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #4f46e5, 0 0 0 4px #ffffff; } .eh-nav-icon { display: inline-flex; width: 20px; height: 20px; }

components.name: SearchInput
components.description: App-specific search input with embedded icon.
components.css: .eh-search { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: 40px; font-family: var(--font-figtree); } .eh-search__icon { position: absolute; left: 12px; width: 16px; height: 16px; color: #94a3b8; pointer-events: none; } .eh-search__input { width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 0 12px 0 36px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #0f172a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5eaf0; border-radius: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .eh-search__input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .eh-search__input:focus { border-color: #4f46e5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79,70,229,0.2); }

components.name: DataTable
components.description: Default table container for lists of documents, reports, or biomarkers.
components.css: .eh-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5eaf0; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04); } .eh-table { width: 100%; min-width: 640px; font-family: var(--font-figtree); font-size: 0.875rem; text-align: left; border-collapse: collapse; } .eh-table thead { background: #f8fafc; border-bottom: 1px solid #eef2f7; } .eh-table th { padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #94a3b8; } .eh-table tbody { border-top: none; } .eh-table td { padding: 14px 16px; color: #0f172a; border-bottom: 1px solid #eef2f7; } .eh-table tr { transition: background 150ms; } .eh-table tr:hover { background: rgba(248,250,252,0.8); }

components.name: StatusChip
components.description: Small status pill with text and contextual color.
components.css: .eh-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: var(--font-figtree); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; border: 1px solid #e5eaf0; border-radius: 9999px; background: #ffffff; color: #64748b; } .eh-chip--success { background: #eaf8ef; color: #1e7a4d; border-color: #a7f3d0; } .eh-chip--warning { background: #fffbeb; color: #92400e; border-color: #fde68a; } .eh-chip--error { background: #fef2f2; color: #b91c1c; border-color: #fecaca; } .eh-chip--info { background: #f0f9ff; color: #075985; border-color: #bae6fd; }

components.name: FilterChip
components.description: Toggle pill for filtering lists and charts.
components.css: .eh-filter-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 14px; font-family: var(--font-figtree); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5eaf0; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms, border-color 150ms; outline: none; } .eh-filter-chip:hover { background: #f8fafc; border-color: #cbd5e1; color: #0f172a; } .eh-filter-chip--active { color: #4f46e5; background: #eef2ff; border-color: #4f46e5; } .eh-filter-chip:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #4f46e5, 0 0 0 4px #ffffff; }

narrative.overview: EasyHealth is a task-first personal health record. The interface reads as a quiet, well-lit workspace: white surfaces, a restrained indigo accent, and teal health signals that only appear when they carry meaning. The goal is to remove noise so users can review labs, documents, and summaries without anxiety. Motion is short and reactive, not theatrical. Density is moderate — enough to act, not so much that medical data feels overwhelming.
keyCharacteristics: One sans-serif family (Figtree) carries every UI surface.
Color strategy is restrained: indigo is the primary action color; teal signals health context; neutrals dominate.
Surfaces are mostly flat; shadows are used sparingly and structurally.
Rounded corners are modest — buttons and inputs stay near-rectangular, while chips and status pills are fully rounded.
Motion is 150–250 ms, transform/opacity only, with a strong ease-out curve.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Indigo is the only action accent. Use it on ≤10% of any screen. Teal and green are health-context colors, not decoration.

rules.name: The 65ch Rule
rules.body: Body paragraphs, disclaimers, and explanatory copy are capped at 65–75ch.

rules.name: The One-or-the-Other Rule
rules.body: A card at rest may have a border OR a small structural shadow, not a 1px border plus a wide diffuse shadow.

dos: Do use Figtree for every label, button, heading, and body string; Geist Mono only for code, identifiers, or timestamps.
Do reserve indigo for primary actions and current selection; it should never become the dominant screen color.
Do pair status colors with text and/or shape so meaning survives for color-blind users.
Do use focus-visible rings for every interactive control.
Do support prefers-reduced-motion for any custom animations.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right ≥ 2px) as accent on cards, alerts, or list items.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or gradient buttons for decoration.
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop blur as a default card style.
Don't pair a 1px border on cards with a wide diffuse shadow (blur ≥ 16px).
Don't exceed 16px corner radius on cards/sections.
Don't rely on color alone to communicate result status — always add text and shape context.
